releaseNotes:
v0.21.1 — fixes the trailing "/1" that was showing up after tablet doses (e.g. Losartan 25 mg/1 → Losartan 25 mg). The FDA's drug database returns tablet strengths as ratios ("per 1 tablet"); RxRescue now strips that tail on lookup. Liquid concentrations like "100 mg/5 mL" and injectables like "10 mg/1 mL" stay intact. Existing entries with the bad value get cleaned up automatically on first launch — no manual editing.

All v0.21 features carry forward: backend-based sync via 6-character setup codes, "Import from old sync folder" button in Settings, narcotic/refrigerated toggle on bottles, zone move from the edit-bottle dialog, raw-capture for unparseable barcodes, "Check for updates" item in the dashboard's three-dot menu.
